title: Owner Builder Course QLD - QBCC-Required, Online $179
description: The QBCC-required QLD owner builder course, 100% online for $179. 18 modules, 80% pass mark, Certificate of Completion valid 5 years for your permit.

hero.h1Html: The QBCC-required owner builder course, online.
hero.subhead: Complete the course the QBCC requires before you apply for your owner builder permit.
hero.howItWorks: Enrol, complete 18 modules and the quiz, lodge your certificate with the QBCC.

artefact.desc: A Certificate of Completion on a desk beside build plans.

blocks.html: Yes, for your permit. The course is QBCC-approved, which is exactly what Queensland requires. It is not a nationally recognised qualification, and it does not need to be. You need an approved course, and this is one.

can: QBCC-approved course material (the NONACCABE QBCC Owner Builder Course).
Issues a Certificate of Completion the QBCC accepts for your permit.
Valid for five years from the day you complete it.
cant: Not a qualification issued under national accreditation.
Not delivered by a Registered Training Organisation.
Not required to be accredited for you to get your owner builder permit.

blocks.html: Why it matters: only QBCC-approved course material is accepted for the permit. For an owner builder permit in Queensland, the approved course does the job.

image.desc: The online course interface on a laptop, clean and self-paced.

blocks.html: Enrol, work through the 18 modules and the online quiz at your own pace, and get your Certificate of Completion the moment you pass. Most people finish the whole thing in a few hours, on any device.

steps.title: Complete the course
steps.body: 18 modules at your own pace, then an online quiz. The pass mark is 80%, with up to 3 attempts.

steps.title: Get your certificate, then apply
steps.body: Lodge it with your QBCC owner builder permit application.

sources.label: QBCC - Apply for an owner builder permit

blocks.html: The course is $179, GST-free, with every charge included. The QBCC permit fee is a separate government charge you pay directly when you lodge your application, so budget for both before you start. Only one of the two is the course fee.

rows.label: Course fee
rows.sub: Paid to ABE Education, all charges included, GST-free

rows.label: QBCC permit fee
rows.sub: Government charge, paid to the QBCC when you lodge

blocks.facts: QBCC permit fee re-verified 14 Jul 2026 after the 1 July indexation.

course.name: QLD Owner Builder Course

experts.name: Dominic Ogburn

bio: Writes the course from the builder's side of the table. CEO of ABE Education since 2007.

experts.name: Warwick Smith
bio: Independently reviews this page to verify that its legislative references and regulatory details are current.

disclaimersHtml: ABE Education is not a Registered Training Organisation. The NONACCABE QBCC Owner Builder Course has been approved by the QBCC (interim approval); the approval applies to the approved course material only.
